Hey Peter -- Ted Cruz is getting worried about losing his good buddy Sen. Cornyn and having to stand next to MJ in the Senate!

Recent polling shows MJ within single digits of Sen. Cornyn, so you can be sure that Ted Cruz is sweating buckets over the likelihood that MJ will win. He, Mitch McConnell, and all their special interest backers have already been doing everything they can to back Sen. Cornyn, but they're going to be pulling out ALL the stops now.

**Pitch in to help MJ fight back and send Sen. Cornyn to an early retirement.**

‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=74451bf66bfb1cc2ce229636992dcebe85af5b4fdbd7cf11b0a2d4d390556e25815a6b20ae72e9478de6977cf28aaf3288ad1d043a84129a

Friend,

This has been a long time coming.

body:
Did you see Margaret’s message?
Friend,

Did you see Margaret’s message?

We are now less than a week away from our mid-month fundraising deadline before our last FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the election.

Can you step up to help reach our $25,000 online fundraising goal we need to hit by the 15th? It’s critically important we stay on track before our end-of-quarter deadline on September 30th, and we’re counting on you to help us reach this important goal.

You can use this secure link to make a donation right now to help us stay on track: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/margaretgoodfl16](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19122550/250206277/1073285021?refcode2=06428ad5-0bf5-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=d65eed6b-0bf5-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=06428ad5-0bf5-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=091220-es-mm-fr-series-2-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjQyOGFkNS0wYmY1LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=diZpotao9BVWoTsqsuC4IsuL87AE0fyQAnK1D5ivgRw=)**

From: **Margaret Good**
Date: Thu, Sept 10, 2020 at 8:00 PM
Subject: in just a few days

Friend,

In just a few days we will be halfway through the month of September and just days away from mail-in ballots hitting voters’ mailboxes. I cannot stress enough how important it is that we stay on track to reach our monthly fundraising goal before **our last Federal Elections Commission end-of-quarter deadline of the election!**

That’s why I’m reaching out to you right now. In order to reach our goal before the end of the quarter, we need to start now. The numbers are getting bigger and the stakes are getting higher. We have set a goal to raise $50,000 by the end of the month, and we need to raise at least half of that before the 15th to stay on track.

**We are up on TV with our first ad, running digital ads, and sending mail out to voters. In order to continue these voter outreach efforts, I’m counting on your help right now.**

**[Can you contribute right now to help us stay on track and reach our $25,000 mid-month online fundraising goal by this time next week? Margaret Good for Congress

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Only corporations who are incorporated in the United States, who utilize U.S. proceeds for the contribution, and for which the decision to contribute was made by an American citizen or lawfully admitted permanent residents may contribute. The Way Ahead does not accept contributions during regular legislative sessions.

If your company has submitted a bid or proposal, except in the case of a competitive sealed bid, pursuant to the Virginia Public Procurement Act, the Public-Private Transportation Act, or the Public-Private Education Facilities and Infrastructure Act where the stated or expected value of the contract is $5 million or more, your company and its directors and officers are prohibited from contributing to The Way Ahead during the period beginning when the bid or proposal is submitted and ending when the contract is awarded or comprehensive agreement is executed.

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: SPECIAL ALERT: Join Me Monday for a Telephone Town Hall
body:
| This Monday at 6:45 p.m., I'm hosting a Telephone Town Hall to share updates on the battle against COVID-19, including what's happening in Congress as we work to provide the next round of emergency relief to meet our nation's health care needs and address the economic distress felt by so many Maryland workers, families, and businesses. I'll be joined by Dr. Harolyn Belcher, Vice President and Chief Diversity Officer at Kennedy Krieger Institute, as well as Professor of Pediatrics at the Johns Hopkins University School of Medicine and Bloomberg School of Public Health. On the call, we'll take your questions on everything from the start of the school year to progress toward a vaccine, to legislative proposals to help weather the economic storm - among other areas of pressing concern.

You can sign up to join the call, or stream it live, at [vanhollen.senate.gov/live](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15422.20086562.4820924.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2flive&redir_log=942008812194262). I hope you're able to join us!

Chris Van Hollen
---

On the call, we'll take your questions on everything from the start of the school year to progress toward a vaccine, to legislative proposals to help weather the economic storm - among other areas of pressing concern. You can sign up to join the call, or stream it live, at . I hope you're able to join us! Chris Van Hollen

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: They Failed YOU Yesterday
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_failed_you_yesterday&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **You asked Senate leaders Paul Gazelka and Warren Limmer one simple thing: FIRE Walz' Small Business Hit Squad Chief Jan Malcolm unless he ends his Emergency Powers.** But they failed YOU and Minnesota yesterday by not bringing up Jan Malcolm's confirmation and adjourning sine die, thus conceding all power they have to Governor Walz. Now the only way they can come back to the Capitol is if Governor Walz calls them back. In the short time they were in session yesterday, they did end up firing Walz' Commerce Commissioner. However, Warren Limmer couldn't be bothered to actually vote himself. There's no excuse for that in the COVID world where Senators can literally call in their vote. It's not like Warren Limmer wasn't aware of the vote. He spoke on the Senate floor prior to it. In fact, Jim Abeler who also spoke abstained from voting on the confirmation. The public firing succeeded because two Democrats voted with the Republicans, including former DFL leader Tom Bakk. Why did Gazelka and Limmer ignore your demands? Well, it appears they struck a backroom deal with Tim Walz that you're not going to like. Before adjourning sine die (which means Senate Republicans can no longer meet and fire commissioners), Gazelka stated that Senators will likely be called back on Sept 21st for a bonding debt bill. It appears that Gazelka and Limmer used their bargaining position of firing commissioners not to end Walz' Emergency Powers, but to strike a final deal on a bonding bill which will add nearly $2 Billion to the state taxpayers' credit card. **Can you believe these guys would sell us out for debt?! Are Republican leaders not serious about ending the greatest threat to our liberties in modern****history?** Yesterday during the House floor session, a real gem was revealed to the public via the stupidity of one Republican legislator. Rep Jon Koznick, Assistant House Minority Leader, sent out an email with the intent to remind fellow Republicans not to message on COVID because it's not a "winning message" for them. However, his email was accidently sent to all Democrat legislators who then decided to pass it on to our local media. Koznick's stupidity revealed what we've long suspected of Republican leadership at the Capitol. They really don't care that Walz is ruling by authoritarian mandate. All they care about is positioning themselves to win the next election.
### What a bunch of FRAUDS!
Gazelka and Limmer don't care about the businesses that are closing their doors due to the the Walz' Administration. They actually had the power to do something about it, and did NOTHING! Thanks to Gazelka and Limmer, we have another 30 days of Walz' abusive Emergency Powers. And we have another 30 days of Walz' Small Business Hit Squad Chief harassing Minnesota businesses with massive fines for not complying with Walz' illegal orders.
### Remember this on November 3rd!
[Action 4 Liberty remains committed to fighting for Minnesotans' liberties](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_failed_you_yesterday&n=2) by ending Walz' Emergency Powers. We'll continue exploring all angles of achieving this and we will take this message to voters in the districts of the Walz' enablers so we get better representation in St Paul. **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_failed_you_yesterday&n=3).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_failed_you_yesterday&n=4).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_failed_you_yesterday&n=5), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sen.=20Dick=20Mazza?=
subject: The Leader We Need
body:
There is no doubt in my mind: Phil Scott is the leader Vermont needs during these tough times. |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a2b3786c9e&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Friend,
---
| I’ve served as a proud Democrat in the State Senate since 1985. I was brought up a Democrat, my father served in the House of Representatives as one, and in 1962, I worked hard to elect Gov. Phil Hoff, Vermont’s first Democratic governor in over a century.

But at the end of the day, we need to support the best person for the job, regardless of political party. **There is no doubt in my mind: Phil Scott is the leader Vermont needs during these tough times. **

When Phil was first elected to the Senate in 2000, I could tell right away how much he cared about Vermont. He wasn’t in it for ego or power, he wanted to solve problems. He didn’t care if you were a Democrat or a Republican, he just wanted to find solutions. That was true then and it still is today.

He has all the qualities we deserve in our leaders: character, compassion, integrity and a deep commitment to public service.

There are some difficult times ahead that will require steady, methodical and common sense leadership. That’s what Phil is all about. Look no further than how he’s handled this crisis so far. If every other governor and the leaders in Washington D.C. acted like Phil has, our country would be in a much better place.

So, whether you’re a Democrat like me, a Republican, independent or a Progressive, **[I hope you’ll join me by pitching in to help make sure Governor Scott wins this race.](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c19346d598&e=19cebfe173) **

I’m just as excited to support Gov. Phil Scott today as I was supporting Gov. Phil Hoff almost 60 year ago. I’m proud to stand with Phil. [I hope you do too](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=34d2a7626e&e=19cebfe173).

Sincerely,

Senator Dick Mazza (D-Grand Isle)

clean_body: There is no doubt in my mind: Phil Scott is the leader Vermont needs during these tough times. | | | | Friend, | I’ve served as a proud Democrat in the State Senate since 1985. I was brought up a Democrat, my father served in the House of Representatives as one, and in 1962, I worked hard to elect Gov. Phil Hoff, Vermont’s first Democratic governor in over a century. But at the end of the day, we need to support the best person for the job, regardless of political party. There is no doubt in my mind: Phil Scott is the leader Vermont needs during these tough times. When Phil was first elected to the Senate in 2000, I could tell right away how much he cared about Vermont. He wasn’t in it for ego or power, he wanted to solve problems. He didn’t care if you were a Democrat or a Republican, he just wanted to find solutions. That was true then and it still is today. He has all the qualities we deserve in our leaders: character, compassion, integrity and a deep commitment to public service. There are some difficult times ahead that will require steady, methodical and common sense leadership. That’s what Phil is all about. Look no further than how he’s handled this crisis so far. If every other governor and the leaders in Washington D.C. acted like Phil has, our country would be in a much better place. So, whether you’re a Democrat like me, a Republican, independent or a Progressive, I’m just as excited to support Gov. Phil Scott today as I was supporting Gov. Phil Hoff almost 60 year ago. I’m proud to stand with Phil. . Sincerely, Senator Dick Mazza (D-Grand Isle) | "DONATE" | | | | | | | | | | | | Phil Scott for Vermont, Glen Wright, Treasurer, P.O. name: KS-SEN Update
subject: Leaked Republican memo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bollier for Kansas
body:
The Republicans are pulling out all the stops to keep this seat red and protect their Senate majority. Barbara needs us to stand with her in the fight to flip this seat -- and take back the Senate. Can you pitch in to her campaign now? |
---
| | You won’t believe this, team: A leaked memo from the National Republican Senatorial Committee highlighted the Kansas race as a **“potential pick up opportunity”** for Democrats in the fight for the Senate majority. The memo goes on to say that because of our historic campaign and Democrats’ chances of winning this fight, the Republicans deployed **“Operation Scorched Prairie”** to contact millions of voters. Yes, they really called it that. [**Team, the Republicans are pulling out all the stops to keep this seat red and protect their Senate majority. Barbara needs us to stand with her in the fight to flip this seat -- and take back the Senate. Can you pitch in $5 to her campaign now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19125785/250267278/1255834449?refcode=em200911nat-i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDJmN2NhNS0yMWY1LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3kvmbMPzbE7Y8RpJ0YMqTQ3OHUHZJm6kd2XZyuOhwU=) This memo makes it clear: the GOP is taking this race seriously -- and they will do whatever it takes to win. The leaked memo on their efforts in Kansas came on the heels of the news that Mitch McConnell-aligned groups were spending millions of dollars on attack ads against Barbara. And if that weren’t proof enough that this race is competitive -- POLITICO just moved the Kansas Senate seat one step closer to a toss-up. We can flip this seat -- and the Senate. subject: I've got a question for you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
Hey there,

I wanted to double-check you saw Thursday's email. If not, I've forwarded it below! ⬇️⬇️

This week, we're asking folks near and far to join our campaign as official Citizen Endorsers, because it's YOUR support that's going to power us to victory on November 3rd.

So, can I count on you to sign on and become a Citizen Endorser of my re-election campaign to represent the people of CA-38?

---------- Forwarded message ---------

While Election Day is officially 53 days away, every registered voter in California will receive a mail-in ballot this year, meaning folks will be casting their votes as early as October!

With less than a month before ballots drop, we're calling on each and every one of you to join Team Sánchez as an official citizen endorser >>

Re-electing Linda will take a true grassroots effort. She's ready to continue fighting for the working families of CA-38 in Congress, but to do that we need to make sure she has the people on her side.

We've set our sights high: we want 5,000 Citizen Endorsers by the end of the week -- however, we can only get there with your help!

Can we count on you to become a Citizen Endorser of Linda's re-election campaign along with forwarding this email to friends?

Thank you!

-- Sánchez HQ

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/P4Uu8w03iPJGZxHiluvJ9M62USeFkdImOdZXZFH6Rw8=/B-A7wO5eesKKGT21KE-BclbQF-_JbdIs6ri5pjZ_myI=.

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e84b/77d4c309/21a22873/2635e2a9/3706959879/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e84b/77d4c309/21a22873/2635e2a8/3706959879/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e84b/77d4c309/21a22873/2635e2ab/3706959879/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

body:
I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about a growing threat to my home of Long Island. | |
---
[ ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=2f94b05a82be4872b49afea7be419eb1&_e=EYfShSzeN5lZOnRWSHz2IiwQhSu0hcWs-Bl1pkOIfNYstUo0G7H5FwwOxxjM2Wwg4DSxizkylUP28gMmCn_O6wZzX07VnAxKmrNvIHN4y8gTjLNyl-m87PX5EEQwBtRfVUPWXXX-_jRk3GMFYsnQiFz-8IlTO_8D1wCOccvfNj_dbes-dfgug_TTZEqJYSRJM6vvvsTKyLxjBixImmkDMm9lyxQlGcIxL7jCUdZqhdXayEo2IP_xss8u5HJHyTtz-bcLLMsCAVZEp4iRw7SWyBAXJ5mJgpqEZqnfwN9k9J1bffeDfSxQBUnXI_V172YlLYtNI4AaIWZzuI0zSxNM6iG9EOQDovBBzgp6GMkhBkQjLPlKeAgAgT4ue2XrOtoSTbPf5Ubtq5SVcbNTuasexBJ9FSvahqza5myObB0BhChsUeJimnd5sHYvmu3LjuIJ)
Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about a growing threat to my home of Long Island. Long Island has always been a refuge for liberty and conservative ideals in an otherwise liberal New York, but our future is being threatened.

After years of radical policies enacted by Democrats at both the state and local level, our backyard of New York City has fallen into a state of _**CHAOS and VIOLENCE.** _Even worse, my liberal opponent, Jackie Gordon, remains silent amidst this destruction!

New York City has been the testing ground for the Left’s _**SOCIALIST PLAN!**_ An agenda that is now spreading to the rest of the country. Riots are happening in almost _**EVERY MAJOR CITY**_ around the country!
[**Bring Law & Order Back to Our Cities**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=2f94b05a82be4872b49afea7be419eb1&_e=EYfShSzeN5lZOnRWSHz2IiwQhSu0hcWs-Bl1pkOIfNYstUo0G7H5FwwOxxjM2Wwg4DSxizkylUP28gMmCn_O6wZzX07VnAxKmrNvIHN4y8gTjLNyl-m87PX5EEQwBtRfVUPWXXX-_jRk3GMFYsnQiFz-8IlTO_8D1wCOccvfNj_dbes-dfgug_TTZEqJYSRJM6vvvsTKyLxjBixImmkDMiaAGIg3994EFO8NY1Z7TSZPakhbLVSVH7xzn_9XgA0jbVnsq_3WfMmOP7FQev_Yz0pc5lLFDV8Z_2nsPW49UULx2EVHLZ3-XRL_wZvu8DGnRIP-4y0uhX-9jdhR_2cSV6U-p9LppaDNcHvB24KPM45NQpcaWznnyPtTZj0XbcFd-aChWkIwZfR_ib4ALKyGe08XUSgAd95-vzYPbpR0PMlhnHUETzqaAL74yessWhu7)
While Jackie Gordon likes to pretend she’s a moderate, her record would say different. **She holds most of the same policies as AOC, and she was even endorsed by a far-left member of the Squad,** **AYANNA PRESSLEY!**
[ ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=2f94b05a82be4872b49afea7be419eb1&_e=EYfShSzeN5lZOnRWSHz2IiwQhSu0hcWs-Bl1pkOIfNYstUo0G7H5FwwOxxjM2Wwg4DSxizkylUP28gMmCn_O6wZzX07VnAxKmrNvIHN4y8gTjLNyl-m87PX5EEQwBtRfVUPWXXX-_jRk3GMFYsnQiFz-8IlTO_8D1wCOccvfNj_dbes-dfgug_TTZEqJYSRJM6vvvsTKyLxjBixImmkDMuzgoGwBPtVG_H9bNwjlxvPlK6DhagtyfE_jav3SoU1Kc5q8sJ0i6rNEiE9ANNPKd2jUCBzoNZfJQ5pGo4fHlVFnovonpKlUHT54WdTpRTlEnXYQYHeD_MbkV4MXjKRf0Xq-hwy21qFAxE52UJN92pWyWxdrn32CI5FOzvtYZRW_T5HyJyfBpdY_C1XDlVLmJAaiDlGeqd9pPXtBPCDtdKmHURbgJL0GbOZ4xi4dE_PS)
If that’s not bad enough, she would be a rubber stamp for Nancy Pelosi and AOC’s plan to **DEFUND OUR POLICE** at a time when violent crime has **RISEN EXPONENTIALLY** in NYC. According to the NYPD, during July 2020 in New York alone...
**There was a +177% increase in the number of shootings. **
**The number of murders increased by +59%.**
**A +286% increase in robberies from this time last year.**
**The number of auto thefts increased by +53%.**
[**Bring Law & Order Back to Our Cities**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=2f94b05a82be4872b49afea7be419eb1&_e=EYfShSzeN5lZOnRWSHz2IiwQhSu0hcWs-Bl1pkOIfNYstUo0G7H5FwwOxxjM2Wwg4DSxizkylUP28gMmCn_O6wZzX07VnAxKmrNvIHN4y8gTjLNyl-m87PX5EEQwBtRfVUPWXXX-_jRk3GMFYsnQiFz-8IlTO_8D1wCOccvfNj_dbes-dfgug_TTZEqJYSRJM6vvvsTKyLxjBixImmkDMiDng78ypSovt9cQO4D96QmuypQGCeWgNowFTLjzXq5VeUdAaSvbZQur17LgVBgsyyQuSezFDLVS48MWSbmuq1Z6CpmTYU5Xw2g9WFuK32S28mhnC5AFHhoP_8Mp2g7qcYECn1sy7-KUT33fm_PimgrU0yt_RigQ4Wi0Vc5s_mgF1N722mxLqpENl9aR9tNakbjx6M9uhqXyojBWq9XYEkoJ6kV9oBjwH3nUHdLQb7TE)
_Why does Jackie Gordon refuse to condemn this violence?_

Perhaps it’s because she is afraid to condemn the radicals in her own party or worse, she actually sides with the _**LEFTIST MOBS**_ and _**CRIMINALS**_ , over the law-abiding citizens of New York and the NYPD.
[ ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=2f94b05a82be4872b49afea7be419eb1&_e=EYfShSzeN5lZOnRWSHz2IiwQhSu0hcWs-Bl1pkOIfNYstUo0G7H5FwwOxxjM2Wwg4DSxizkylUP28gMmCn_O6wZzX07VnAxKmrNvIHN4y8gTjLNyl-m87PX5EEQwBtRfVUPWXXX-_jRk3GMFYsnQiFz-8IlTO_8D1wCOccvfNj_dbes-dfgug_TTZEqJYSRJM6vvvsTKyLxjBixImmkDMqBes8VUjtH-_3Yf_Byu0m-sfzO8_goB2cK3PR_dB90AHld5XuLSX0c2et268CgbUOvQa8aHlue6Zm6m8geJLtEZ5E42n_Nk6bGSN_lBJD43Adpau-Hddn2BUWCcjNO0pnox6HI9TvA8-VVylmfmTWnW_TKtIpCwHm7JljdCOMPoItPP6GVZcWP3cPZ6aU6ozZNQ5wUrQ5PJ6XmnEit6fqz1wujtOqSuTL_qwMATag8h)
**Democrats, like Jackie Gordon, want to recreate this socialist nightmare on a national level in every city, town, and community around this country!**

Peter, Long Island is only a couple of miles away from New York City, that’s why I’m reaching out to you! We can’t let this radical socialism spread to Long Island. Unlike Jackie Gordon, I want to protect Long Island and ensure it remains a place of _**LAW**_ and _**ORDER**_ , not mob violence! **But I’m going to need your help! **

clean_body: I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about a growing threat to my home of Long Island. | | Peter, I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about a growing threat to my home of Long Island. Long Island has always been a refuge for liberty and conservative ideals in an otherwise liberal New York, but our future is being threatened. After years of radical policies enacted by Democrats at both the state and local level, our backyard of New York City has fallen into a state of CHAOS and VIOLENCE. Even worse, my liberal opponent, Jackie Gordon, remains silent amidst this destruction! New York City has been the testing ground for the Left’s SOCIALIST PLAN! An agenda that is now spreading to the rest of the country. Riots are happening in almost EVERY MAJOR CITY around the country! While Jackie Gordon likes to pretend she’s a moderate, her record would say different. She holds most of the same policies as AOC, and she was even endorsed by a far-left member of the Squad, AYANNA PRESSLEY! If that’s not bad enough, she would be a rubber stamp for Nancy Pelosi and AOC’s plan to DEFUND OUR POLICE at a time when violent crime has RISEN EXPONENTIALLY in NYC. According to the NYPD, during July 2020 in New York alone... There was a +177% increase in the number of shootings. The number of murders increased by +59%. A +286% increase in robberies from this time last year. The number of auto thefts increased by +53%. Why does Jackie Gordon refuse to condemn this violence? Perhaps it’s because she is afraid to condemn the radicals in her own party or worse, she actually sides with the LEFTIST MOBS and CRIMINALS , over the law-abiding citizens of New York and the NYPD. Democrats, like Jackie Gordon, want to recreate this socialist nightmare on a national level in every city, town, and community around this country! Peter, Long Island is only a couple of miles away from New York City, that’s why I’m reaching out to you! We can’t let this radical socialism spread to Long Island. Unlike Jackie Gordon, I want to protect Long Island and ensure it remains a place of LAW and ORDER , not mob violence! But I’m going to need your help! If my radical opponent gets elected, the Democrats will double down on this unrest and violence! Don’t let Long Island fall to socialism the same way New York City has! Thank you, Andrew Garbarino | | | PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS | | P.O. Box 101, Bayport, NY 11705 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Jon Ossoff (personal)
subject: My challenge for you, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We can't afford another 6 years of David Perdue. |
---
Friend,

On August 28, with just three days left in the month, I asked this team if we could raise $100,000 in grassroots donations by the end of August.

You answered the call, and we crushed our goal.

**With Mitch McConnell's super PAC having spent more against me than any other Democratic challenger in America while we hold a narrow lead in the polls,_we need to do it again._**

**[Today, I'm challenging this small-dollar army to raise another $100,000 in the next FOUR DAYS so we stay on track this quarter against the $35 MILLION Mitch McConnell and his allies are spending against me.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e295c/5b2c1286/39532bb2/25f36e77/2728899311/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_12_jon_100k?refcode=em_2020_09_12_jon_100k")**
| | [DONATE $10 TO ELECT JON](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e295c/5b2c1286/39532bb2/25f36e79/2728899311/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_12_jon_100k?refcode=em_2020_09_12_jon_100k&amount=10")
---

McConnell and his right-wing allies are inundating the airwaves with their outlandish attack ads in a desperate last-ditch effort to bail out my opponent.

**Friend, Georgia can't afford another six years of David Perdue. He has totally failed us.**

Perdue and Donald Trump were both denying, delaying, and lying to the public FOR MONTHS about the impending COVID-19 pandemic.

While Perdue was busy trading stocks, he was telling us that the risk to our health was low and the impact on economic growth would be little.

Now over 190,000 Americans have died, and millions lost their jobs.

**David Perdue lied to us about the threat we faced while he lined his own pockets._My opponent put his allegiance to this president and his own wealth above his allegiance to our state._**

They allowed this virus to spiral out of control. The toll in human life, burden of disease, and economic devastation has been catastrophic.

Friend, to get this virus under control, we need a public health response guided by scientific expertise. As Senator, I will put medical doctors and public health experts at the forefront, and I'll always level with my constituents about threats to our health and prosperity.

**[So today, please help us hit our $100,000 mid-month goal so I can stay on track to win in Georgia and send David Perdue into retirement.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e295c/5b2c1286/39532bb2/25f36e77/2728899311/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_12_jon_100k?refcode=em_2020_09_12_jon_100k")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Mark Warner Campaign HQ
subject: We want to see your name on our map, Derek!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark Warner has support all over the Commonwealth!
|
---

| | Derek,

**This is a grassroots campaign.** It always has been. And as you can see, Mark Warner has support coming from every corner of the Commonwealth. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac1/53d9897e/55fa7039/1c880b96/2338625237/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-map?refcode=20200912_f_1_nd__776__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
**[Can you add Manassas to our map by making a donation today?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac1/53d9897e/55fa7039/1c880b95/2338625237/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-map?refcode=20200912_f_1_nd__776__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**
**With just 52 days until the election on November 3rd, we can 't afford to let Mark's momentum slow. **

Mark won his 2014 election by less than 1% -- our team is not taking anything for granted in this campaign. From the very beginning, Mark wanted to run a campaign for every Virginian, and widespread support for his campaign from across the Commonwealth is proof that folks know he's working hard for _every_ Virginian.

Thank you for being a key part of this campaign.

-- Team Warner

subject: will you promise me this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
This won’t take long, but I wanted to ask you for a personal favor. | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=39a0715923424b6f8c1822b898530780&_e=kvV7feY4GmNuU4MvWw4vFKrgZufrFvIF3c2YOxAbr1cU9-2S-64HjMlu5nQlwnqNE8aForLXTmLNGjOsWCRPbxwky4kV6C_gytB3xi9V7J8h8QCvBQ9X9NylEqVyDZKwYcii6no5KTEgDUllZ4yhMvEMoxyvYbFJF5WDROEyQqLPvskhzLHMzkffuHiHcXxtV0BbGXuYeP3qIwhJdWrYq06wI_Kdb5IfbZj-S3Tokj0BAkZMf20wXZ22LFx-S4tbmL1VNpC8zi0mZ9YYpG9EsyBLbGdxXYBFnYvkU6tp7MO_0hJNDggEIGqEKtLPDCtfpPYrcIYXxRy3cC1UObemshrSVK1NOgfUw6yCEzSKck18FhzO_tX46tuULtDeQ8EkqS4IV6G00s_HAAyj0MrbgQmuEXeEW_B1OTN48_jO-v7wr3lyzNPLCEyMZcE-mC_lmq_Yo-RpoE_NQJr_idmgPNP7qR2ItxOsqjhuJauIyGY%3D) |

Hey friend \- it’s Governor Eric Holcomb.

_This won’t take long, but I wanted to ask you for a personal favor. _

As governor, it’s my job to keep Hoosiers safe. I take that job seriously — there’s nothing more important to me than making sure everyone in our state has a chance to thrive.

Right now, that means making sure our economy powers through COVID-19 and that our small businesses come out the other side of this stronger than ever.

There’s no doubt that, together, we’re making progress.
* Indiana’s unemployment rate has dropped and is now 2.4% below the national average as more Hoosiers get back to work safely.
* Our labor force participation rate is nearing pre-pandemic levels.

But there’s more work to be done.

**That’s why I’m reaching out right now and asking you for a promise. Will you pledge to support our small businesses (safely) as we work to get them back on track? **

Whether that’s going out to eat, ordering take out, or shopping at your favorite Main Street store, you’ll be helping our small businesses weather this storm, just like they’ve helped our communities so many times before.

Use the link below and join me in pledging to do whatever we can to support Hoosier small businesses (safely).

**[https://secure.holcombforindiana.com/pledge-103086/small-biz-pledge/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=39a0715923424b6f8c1822b898530780&_e=kvV7feY4GmNuU4MvWw4vFKrgZufrFvIF3c2YOxAbr1cU9-2S-64HjMlu5nQlwnqNE8aForLXTmLNGjOsWCRPbxwky4kV6C_gytB3xi9V7J8h8QCvBQ9X9NylEqVyDZKwYcii6no5KTEgDUllZ4yhMvEMoxyvYbFJF5WDROEyQqLPvskhzLHMzkffuHiHcXxtV0BbGXuYeP3qIwhJdWrYq06wI_Kdb5IfbZj-S3Tokj0BAkZMf20wXZ22LFx-S4tbmL1VNpC8zi0mZ9YYpG9EswdNYJPnYWwSo4XouFSXEwQPvOTkv8f4gSxiMC2JJmJHTN0xJXKk3edYgQeg2JqisoYVyNaoCGUpu_FQR71ureXQQkCnjTYA3YHbyeA2Vc2VLug8GWXJ5UAY27HyAyqPueX4RpI-lQ6H0E66LAyzJkMSw2ZKBkDgFxeGkG2BZ3knV0KpwTUKSbt5jO6A0UPwVHH5yEwROg1oOOBiCMpiAL8%3D)**

Thank you for your support,

Governor Eric Holcomb

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Did you see yesterday’s Staffer Highlight of the Week?
body:
Earlier this week, I sent out an email introducing you to my wonderful team, who have been working tirelessly to flip IL-16. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7732a867bca8/did-you-see-yesterdays-staffer-highlight-of-the-week?e=140a9b81e7)
---
|
---
| | Earlier this week, I sent out an email introducing you to my wonderful team, who have been working tirelessly to flip IL-16. However, I want to go one step further and highlight a staffer every week, so you can really get to know them. I already posted this week’s highlight on our Facebook page, [which you should go like if you haven’t already](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=4b407265cd&e=140a9b81e7). First up is Keelan -- Keelan is my Call Time Manager. He began with the team as an intern and was committed to providing whatever value he could to the campaign. We brought him on as CTM this summer and he's been critical. His job is sitting next to me while I'm on the phones (reminder that we need campaign finance reform!), making sure I stay on top of calls and follow-ups, doing donor research and taking notes/pledges/etc. Sometimes he drives while I ride shotgun and we eat Pringles and he tells me to get back on the phone. Keelan is a huge asset to the team -- he's genial and kind and also really excellent at his job. He's also the person who writes most of the content for our fundraising emails!
This is what grassroots looks like, everyone.
Want to make Keelan's job a little easier? Know Keelan personally and want to support him? [Click here to donate.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=6232348e49&e=140a9b81e7)

I know it would mean a great deal to him.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19127293/250311687/530299499?refcode=FL_email_fr_20200912birthdayPM_BH_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzU1OWQ4OC0zMmY1LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V7bv9egyl2ViXVjOZPs5RhV9lknyK_fsoTwJqalKI1E=)

clean_body: It’s Josh’s birthday, and I’m hoping you can join me in wishing him a happy birthday today! | = | | Hey, everyone! It’s Bethany, Josh’s wife. I’m writing because it’s Josh’s birthday, and I’m hoping you can join me in wishing him a happy birthday today! | | = Over the last year, it’s been a privilege to watch my husband run this race sticking to his values — Kentucky values. Josh isn’t from a family of politicians. We don’t have a bunch of connections in Washington, DC. We’re Kentuckians who know that things must change to work for regular folks. = Most importantly, Josh is a man who believes if there’s a job that needs to be done, someone ought to step up and do it. Thousands of folks like you have noticed the hard work he’s put into this race, and you’ve stepped up to support his campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for everything, Bethany | | Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click . = | | You’re invited to join us for an exciting conversation with Jessica Cisneros, Julián Castro, and Mike Siegel this Tuesday, September 15th from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM CDT. Together, we’re going to turn Texas blue! This is one of the most competitive districts in Texas, that’s why Julián and Jessica are all-in to send Mike to Congress! Changing demographics have made this district more flippable than ever! We're hard at work on the ground building broad coalitions and mobilizing new voters. Mike is dedicated to fighting for folks traditionally left out of the political process. But we need your help to reach as many voters as possible! If you're interested in joining us for this event, you can RSVP for this event by =, or emailing me at mailto:Kendahl@SiegelforTexas.org. I hope to see you there! | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Kendahl = | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, click . | Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress Mike Siegel for Congress PO Box 2409 Austin, Texas 78701 United States mailto:siegel@siegelfortexas.org

_**95% of you responded that you do NOT trust the polls.**_

That’s an absolutely overwhelming majority – and it shows just how **out of touch** mainstream media is with Main Street America.

I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again:

This is the most important election of our lifetimes, and we can’t stand by and watch as biased media outlets attempt to stand in the way of us taking back the House this November.

name: Matt Mowers
subject: We did it, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mowers for Congress |
body:
I still can’t believe what happened on Tuesday. | |
---
Hey, friend,

All I can say is wow.

After months of hard work, we did it. We won the primary election!

The primary was the only thing standing between me and Chris Pappas. Now, I’m ready to take him on in the general election in November.

Winning the primary was tough, but it doesn’t hold a candle to what lies ahead. I’m going to need all the help I can get from my Granite State grassroots army.

If you are able, help me hit the ground running by chipping in to my campaign today. No amount is too small, even $1 can help us start strong. I want to send Chris Pappas a clear message: _**The general election battle starts right now, and Team Mowers is a force to be reckoned with.**_

Click **[here](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=6bf842a5c23344fa87e4f91309dd72ca&_e=CXApGWAjUDjxZYdM7hMA-reHWnT9UCV6ijCZdDr5giHrZ3Gm38nqmNb6HlCuF7psCoLm-VGns_Q_GA8gxL3ASIZPnnUJHHthxetkm5c5fnjtFEvvXn2eGnqb5oM5mvm--gQmbT4gYfpU-DX7X5Vcauxm6WEFJbsQbqqEry26InTqn-3whnAKcmL_KcbNwvQJka8d8KwaD6tsJnxt6ePU8fAW9oWkEQr-SkTaMcJSK1HJFEamWK6OHq1gr_MPD0XaKIw-KjwTz_xXdN4lUj5aQVMuW3UDeCbmxLe64JAJqc60lLIwn0r4aTTScmZiE7T8UpQIp8sgLpGfW42S2W2VhmG5NXouENVnpLBgXaD07o7gRQFRRgqNgIoqfVkk9hWBNOTWn8W_MAs4YDpzXLLfmcndMgZ62zlRv9U4si93P8CCFxqM6LXMiKYmGZ8LQQu-vJw-zeeKR1q2hw9uWZcMQWcPAFnxOT9ADmK3hvGWM1SrnTsAEcTGbtQBFO63CaLf)** to chip in whatever you can to help me give Chris Pappas a taste of what he’s going up against in November.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Randy=20Feenstra?=
subject: Mariannette is a leader we can count on
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

In the Iowa Senate, it took teamwork to deliver results. When we cut taxes, protected the Second Amendment, delivered for farmers, and balanced the budget, I worked with a determined team of leaders that understood what needed to be done and how to do it.

Mariannette Miller-Meeks was a critical part of that team.

A military veteran, a doctor, a Senator, and a conservative, Mariannette has proven she has the experience, the toughness, and the mindset needed to deliver. She never quits, she cares deeply about Iowans, and she loves this country. That’s the kind of leader we can count on, and exactly the kind of teammate I need in Congress.

---
| [Help out here!](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=5f001433af&e=16fac31a0f "Help out here!")
---
| | | Democrat mega-donors and coastal millionaires are working hard to make sure Mariannette doesn’t win, pouring in hundreds of thousands of dollars to buy another vote for Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

**We don’t need more Pelosi pawns, we need leaders we can count on. **

I can count on Mariannette Miller-Meeks to have my back in Washington, and Iowans can count on her to have theirs. She’ll never quit, and together we will deliver.

[Will you help Mariannette today with a contribution of $5, $10, $20, or $50?](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=f7951e0579&e=16fac31a0f) Every dollar counts, and with our help, Mariannette can turn the second district **RED.**
---
| [CHIP IN $5](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=da4109179b&e=16fac31a0f "CHIP IN $5")
---
| Thank you for whatever you can do to help!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Barrett?=
subject: Trump knew and Loudermilk remains silent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dana Barrett for Congress**
body:
Trump was informed in FEBRUARY that the virus was going to be deadly, and he did nothing. |
---
| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=95ee559512&e=e25784ff28)
---
| | | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=1a384e39c6&e=e25784ff28)
---
Trump knew. He knew that coronavirus wasn’t a hoax and that it wasn’t just a ‘bad flu.’ Trump was informed in FEBRUARY that the virus was going to be deadly, **and he did nothing**.

The federal government didn’t prepare the country. They didn’t even warn the country. In fact, Trump downplayed the whole thing, boasting, “We’ve never shut the country down for the flu” and “It’ll go away by April.”

And what’s most telling about this situation is **the silence of Barry Loudermilk.** If you want a leader for this district, we need to make sure that Dana gets elected in November. [**Can you chip in $10, $20, or $30 (or whatever you can) right now to help us boost our campaign? → **](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=72c7fce06c&e=e25784ff28)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [$10 →](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=7511616635&e=e25784ff28)
---
| [$25 →](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=f7231f6c69&e=e25784ff28)
---
| [$50 →](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=9335bf73ec&e=e25784ff28)
---
| [$100 →](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=b231bfdfb9&e=e25784ff28)
---
| [$250 →](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=8fc2b92530&e=e25784ff28)
---
| [Other →](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=78904e7d4a&e=e25784ff28)
---

Loudermilk has not only voted with Trump 96% of the time, but he is one of his strongest supporters. Has he condemned the President for not preparing the country, not warning our healthcare systems, and not implementing back to school plans? NO.

**He’s even held in-person meetings with no masks, putting people in our district in harm’s way. **

Dana believes in science, and listens to experts like Dr. Anthony Fauci. Even Trump knows that the virus is spread through the air. So why is Loudermilk not condemning the President for the death of almost 200,000 Americans? Because Trump won’t like it, plain and simple.

Loudermilk is one of Trump’s top cronies, and that means he will _not_ have Georgia’s 11th district in mind when he’s legislating. He will _not_ make the necessary decisions to get our economy back on track, and he will _not_ ensure safety requirements are being followed.

**That’s why we need leaders like Dana who will do everything in their power to make sure we get back on our feet and move in the right direction again. **

[**So , help us get Dana to Congress by donating $10 right now to fight Loudermilk’s complacency. **](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=d34dd9f798&e=e25784ff28)
**[DONATE $10](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=fc93314ba8&e=e25784ff28)**
---

Keep on fighting,
\-- Team Barrett

clean_body: Trump was informed in FEBRUARY that the virus was going to be deadly, and he did nothing. | | | | | | Trump knew. He knew that coronavirus wasn’t a hoax and that it wasn’t just a ‘bad flu.’ Trump was informed in FEBRUARY that the virus was going to be deadly, and he did nothing. The federal government didn’t prepare the country. They didn’t even warn the country. In fact, Trump downplayed the whole thing, boasting, “We’ve never shut the country down for the flu” and “It’ll go away by April.” And what’s most telling about this situation is the silence of Barry Loudermilk. If you want a leader for this district, we need to make sure that Dana gets elected in November. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | Loudermilk has not only voted with Trump 96% of the time, but he is one of his strongest supporters. Has he condemned the President for not preparing the country, not warning our healthcare systems, and not implementing back to school plans? NO. He’s even held in-person meetings with no masks, putting people in our district in harm’s way. Dana believes in science, and listens to experts like Dr. Anthony Fauci. Even Trump knows that the virus is spread through the air. So why is Loudermilk not condemning the President for the death of almost 200,000 Americans? Because Trump won’t like it, plain and simple. Loudermilk is one of Trump’s top cronies, and that means he will not have Georgia’s 11th district in mind when he’s legislating. He will not make the necessary decisions to get our economy back on track, and he will not ensure safety requirements are being followed. That’s why we need leaders like Dana who will do everything in their power to make sure we get back on our feet and move in the right direction again. name: Sandy Smith
subject: If they win it is OVER
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1_JfvkkX3Nxmng&b=B3qjapCDzwTZea5ESskDrw)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a business owner, not a career politician, and I will serve its people and NOT myself!**

Joe Biden has been in DC for nearly five decades.
He and Nancy Pelosi have been responsible for nearly every disastrous government action in that time. The 1994 Crime Bill, Obamacare, Dodd-Frank, tax hikes, you name it.... it's all their fault.
I'm running against another career politician who messes up constantly and doesn't know when to leave the stage: G.K. Butterfield. He's Nancy Pelosi's Deputy Whip, and they are two peas in a pod!
_**Honestly, I don't even know why Butterfield runs for office. All he does is take orders from Nancy Pelosi! He doesn't even like his own district; he lives in a place in DC with his girlfriend, and only returns on rare occasions.**_
_He could get away with that stuff when this district included the Democrat stronghold of Durham- but it doesn't anymore! Since the courts cut out Durham and added hundreds of thousands of Republican donors.... G.K. is in trouble!_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1_JfvkkX3Nxmng&b=B3qjapCDzwTZea5ESskDrw)
---

_Our district is ready to give Pelosi's lieutenant the boot; I've already raised over 10x what G.K.'s previous best Republican opponent has raised!_

People in North Carolina are sick and tired of Nancy Pelosi as Speaker. Queen Nancy dines on gourmet ice cream and gets her hair done by special appointment at a closed salon.... while she gives more power to radical members of the Democrats, including AOC!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1_JfvkkX3Nxmng&b=HylDdlwIcCDcq2N1HciRtg)
---

**_Joe Biden has been in office so long he has lost his cognitive ability. Check out what he said about his decline to a group of Black and Hispanic journalists:_**

_“No, I haven’t taken a test! Why the hell would I take a test? Come on, man! That’s like saying to you before you got on this program you have to take a test where you’re taking cocaine or not. What do you think huh? Are you a junkie?”_

_50 years is more than enough for Joe Biden to be in politics, 40 years is more than enough for Nancy Pelosi, and 40 years is enough for G.K. Butterfield._

The Democrat Press makes excuses for them. They say that having a country run by leftists past their prime is a good thing.

I beg to differ.

**Pelosi's Democrats don't care about you. They just want to control you with rules that they stopped caring about long ago!**

[If you agree with me, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1_JfvkkX3Nxmng&b=B3qjapCDzwTZea5ESskDrw) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I know what everyday Americans go through. I'll re-open the economy!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1_JfvkkX3Nxmng&b=B3qjapCDzwTZea5ESskDrw), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield;s record is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1_JfvkkX3Nxmng&b=B3qjapCDzwTZea5ESskDrw)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1_JfvkkX3Nxmng&b=B3qjapCDzwTZea5ESskDrw)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1_JfvkkX3Nxmng&b=B3qjapCDzwTZea5ESskDrw)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1_JfvkkX3Nxmng&b=B3qjapCDzwTZea5ESskDrw) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsrAxMzKzM) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsrAxMzKzM)

name: Bill Olson
subject: Despicable what the left does to vets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I spent 27 years in the U.S, Army, with my sons also serving in the armed forces! I will not let the media's concocted lies about President Trump run over the truth about his support for our military!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg

The most consistent supporters of the President has been soldiers and vets like me- and it's easy to understand why.

President Trump has been very good to us!

The President has given our men and women in uniform raises every year he has been in office. He has also donated his salary, several times, to military and veteran causes.

There is no one who follows politics who seriously thinks the President holds veterans and our military in anything but the highest regard! After all... he hasn't started any new wars, first President in a long while to say that!

To make matters worse, the far-Left and their media allies lied boldfaced in saying a wounded Marine called Trump a liar when he had NOT:

The original story published by the Atlantic cited four anonymous sources claiming to have firsthand knowledge of the discussion in which Trump made the controversial comments. Since then, a number of people who placed themselves in the room during the reported conversation, including former U.S. National Security Adviser John Bolton, who has a rocky past with Trump, have stepped forward to deny that the president ever made those disparaging remarks. Henline said he believes the story to be false.

“I really believe the president didn't say this," Henline said. "There’s been anonymous sources and other sources in the room that aren’t necessarily friends with the president or believe in his ways, but they're still not gonna slam him and make up this rumor and keep it spreading. And so with that said, I don't think he really said this."

Although many doubt the veracity of the story, Henline believes it was successful in its intent to turn veterans against the president.

“Them taking that well-recognized photo and using it for their agenda and changing veterans' minds, thinking the president talks to them like that is ridiculous," Henline said.

Here's the doctored meme that Henline says is NOT true:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg

Thank you for standing up for the truth, Mr. Henline!

Of course President Trump believes him to be a hero- he invited him to the White House and decorated him for his valor and service in the military!

Trump visits Walter Reed Hospital every week to check up on wounded soldiers- and importantly, he doesn't create more of them by getting us into more wars!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg

It is abundantly clear- the Fake News Media is an appendage of the extreme Left and actively hates us. You shouldn't be able to lie about anyone and hide behind made-up "anonymous" sources. This is what Americans hate about the media!

Here's the good news: The American people see this. They are rallying behind our American President- and that includes military and veterans like me!

That's why we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg

I won't be afraid to fight. I'll fight the media and I'll fight for our veterans, like President Trump has.

Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". The media openly mocks us and thinks we have to swallow it! We have to fight if we don't want to be treated like this!

I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I am a veteran and a patriot and I need your help to counter the media's lies!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg

Help me replace Socialist Darren Soto, so we can toss these people from office! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the media!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j1wxdqtbeF6OuRU&b=V4xpZ4DC6BnZIBjGuylwYg
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

Friend,

Mitch McConnell has a lot on his mind these days.

He is desperately trying to save his Senate majority amid Democratic momentum in Senate races all across the country, and he's in his own competitive re-election race in Kentucky.

**By having his allies pour $35 MILLION into Jon Ossoff's race in Georgia, Mitch is probably hoping that GOP Senator David Perdue will cruise to victory here and he'll have one less seat to worry about.**

**_But Mitch is wrong._**

Jon is surging in this race, and we're on track to win.

With our mid-month deadline coming up, let's show Mitch the strength of this people-powered, grassroots movement. **And that his millions in super PAC money won't make his problems go away.**

**[Friend, can you donate $10 to help us elect Jon and end Mitch McConnell's Senate majority?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e295d/5b2c1286/395a001d/25f36db9/833138688/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_12_mad?refcode=em_2020_09_12_mad&amount=10")**

| Our movement to take on AOC's socialist squad is gaining serious momentum. The Radical Left and the fake news media won't be able to stop us from taking on the D.C. Swamp and the RINO "Republicans" \- that secretly hate President Trump as much as Antifa - if we stand together.
We are now only 52 days from November 3rd and I need to know that you are going to stand with me and our great president to win in 2020.

body:
| | | Peter, I want to make sure you saw this email because it was an important one. I'm teaming up with my fellow Iowa Democrats to raise as much money as we can to fend off massive outside DC spending in our races. These attacks are coming into Iowa from the largest Republican Super PAC in the country. We can't let outside voices mislead voters about our records. Iowa Democrats have always stuck together. We all value education, health care, access to opportunity for all, and real Iowan values. **[Now, you have the chance to give to my campaign, Cindy Axne's and Abby Finkenauer's at once. Will you donate any amount today for us to split evenly between our campaigns?](https://act.myngp.com/el/eA_KDKez69uwslrTBZayQZ3XGEjHcjvcJ7m8gdwwwrw=/_mmWEbHak0HPMfUiW1Rdm3HRoQTk14Wlg-JdVjM7kWA=?refcode=200912-email-rh-2)** Thanks for being on our team. \-- Rita Hart **\----- Forwarded Message -----** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/eA_KDKez69uwslrTBZayQZ3XGEjHcjvcJ7m8gdwwwrw=/aIiv6cethxVi0vyWE6z7zMDxJ_rlRWKlZ1lklJCVouw=?refcode=200912-email-rh-2) **URGENT NEWS:**
Iowa House races will be decided by razor-thin margins! **[We need your help to fight back for a united, blue Iowa](https://act.myngp.com/el/eA_KDKez69uwslrTBZayQZ3XGEjHcjvcJ7m8gdwwwrw=/aIiv6cethxVi0vyWE6z7zMDxJ_rlRWKlZ1lklJCVouw=?refcode=200912-email-rh-2)** | ****[Donate to three IA races](https://act.myngp.com/el/eA_KDKez69uwslrTBZayQZ3XGEjHcjvcJ7m8gdwwwrw=/aIiv6cethxVi0vyWE6z7zMDxJ_rlRWKlZ1lklJCVouw=?refcode=200912-email-rh-2&amount=5&express_lanes=true)****
---
* * *
We're teaming up with Cindy Axne and Abby Finkenauer for a joint fundraiser to supply all our campaigns with the resources we need to keep up in some of the most competitive races in the country.
Dark money GOP groups are flooding Iowa and all these races are projected to be won by razor-thin margins. Iowa Democrats stick together, and we need our small-dollar donor base to step up now more than ever with less than two months until Election Day.
**[Iowans across our state need leaders who will protect affordable health care and Social Security and create an economy that works for everyone. Donate $30 today and send $10 to each of our campaigns!](https://act.myngp.com/el/eA_KDKez69uwslrTBZayQZ3XGEjHcjvcJ7m8gdwwwrw=/_mmWEbHak0HPMfUiW1Rdm3HRoQTk14Wlg-JdVjM7kWA=?refcode=200912-email-rh-2)**

**[We know that with so much on the line, we can't afford to leave anything up to chance. name: Georgia HQ - Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Fwd: One year since I launched this campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We need Jon's leadership in the Senate. |
---
Can you believe it, friend? It's already been _a whole year_ since Jon Ossoff formally launched his Senate campaign.

Our country is facing crisis after crisis right now, but these problems are solvable. We just need new leaders in Washington to get it done -- and Jon is prepared to do just that.

**Jon is committed to fighting for Georgia families and rooting out Washington corruption.** We need his leadership in the Senate -- _not another six years of David Perdue pleasing wealthy donors and adding to his profit margin._

**Friend, Mitch McConnell's super PACs are spending gobsmacking amounts of money to save Perdue's seat and McConnell's Senate majority.[We need to raise $100,000 by the middle of this month to keep pace. Can you make a small contribution right now to help us retake the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2950/5b2c1286/395c3204/25f36d04/3689105290/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_one_yr?refcode=em_2020_09_12_one_yr_k")**

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Jon Ossoff
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** September 10, 2020
**Subject:** One year since I launched this campaign

Friend, WOW: **It's been exactly one year since I formally launched this Senate campaign.**

_The world has changed in ways that are tough to process._

But some things haven't changed at all:

The child poverty rate in rural Georgia is among the worst in the nation.

Millions of Georgians still lack high-quality, affordable health care.

Georgia still has one of the worst maternal mortality rates in the entire country, and the privacy of women's reproductive health care is still under attack.

The President of the United States is still an aspiring despot with authoritarian instincts and contempt for the rule of law.

**Washington is still riddled with corruption that's turned Congress into a tool of powerful private interests like pharmaceutical companies and big polluters.**

My opponent, GOP Senator David Perdue, is still too busy handing out favors to his donors and apologizing for Donald Trump to serve the people he's sworn to represent.

**[The problems that need solving aren't mysterious. Neither are the solutions. What's needed is new leadership. Friend, will you help me win?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2950/5b2c1286/395c3204/25f36d04/3689105290/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_one_yr?refcode=em_2020_09_12_one_yr_k")**

Friend, when I announced my run for U.S. Senate, I said **_Georgia was going to be the country's MOST COMPETITIVE STATE in 2020._**

The pundits said that was preposterous.

Twelve months later, I am leading GOP Senator David Perdue in the polls, and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more money against me than ANY OTHER DEMOCRATIC CHALLENGER in America.

Twelve months ago, I said my opponent was the embodiment of the corrupt Washington establishment. _Then he got caught fiendishly trading stocks while publicly downplaying the risk of COVID-19._

**A year ago, I said we'd need a grassroots army unlike anything Georgia had seen to defeat Perdue. And with your help, we're poised to generate RECORD TURNOUT in Georgia.**

**Friend, your grassroots support -- these $10, $20, and $30 contributions -- KEEP US GOING. We truly depend on you.**

_YOU are why Mitch McConnell has been forced to pour tens of millions of dollars into a last-ditch effort to save David Perdue._

**[Together, we will win this race, retake the U.S. Senate, and turn the page on this dark chapter in our history. Our country is facing crisis after crisis right now, but these problems are solvable. We just need new leaders in Washington to get it done -- and Jon is prepared to do just that. Jon is committed to fighting for Georgia families and rooting out Washington corruption. We need his leadership in the Senate -- not another six years of David Perdue pleasing wealthy donors and adding to his profit margin. Friend, Mitch McConnell's super PACs are spending gobsmacking amounts of money to save Perdue's seat and McConnell's Senate majority. name: MJ Hegar
subject: Climate change is real, and we're running out of time to fight it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f70/7f51f7bc/454ac73b/4efa2e3f/1316980057/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

In the summer of 2008 my squadron fought wildfires in California and rescued folks in Southeast Texas after Hurricane Ike. Those disasters were terrible, and yet every year the disasters worsen. The fires become more destructive, and the hurricanes hit harder.

Climate change is real, and we're running out of time to fight it. Things will continue to get worse if we don't take action right now. Here in Texas, we've seen the damage up close and personal -- communities devastated by "500-year floods" every few years, catastrophic damage to our cities. **[We need to take action now.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f70/7f51f7bc/454ac73b/4efa2e3e/1316980057/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200912.3nd__2108__&amount=10")**

My mission from 2008 isn't over. Right now the West Coast is on fire, and hurricanes continue to batter the Gulf Coast. I'm taking the fight to Washington, to ensure that we have leaders ready to fight climate change, but I need your help to get there.

**Will you support me on this mission and donate to help me take action on climate change in the Senate?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac0/53d9897e/55f455d9/1c880b83/2520516/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

As Mark Warner continues to work hard to make life better for every Virginian, our team is committed to sending these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with what Mark is focused on now that the Senate is back in session this week.

**Here 's what Mark is working on right now:**
* With less than 60 days until Election Day on November 3rd, **[Mark is pressuring Congress to take legislative action against foreign interference in our elections.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac0/53d9897e/55f455d9/1c880b82/2520516/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.politico.com/news/2020/09/09/warner-election-security-410897")** He wants to ensure we are protected from targeted attacks on social media, and is working to push legislation including the _Foreign Influence Reporting in Elections (FIRE) Act_ and the _Honest Ads Act_ for more transparency in digital advertising and foreign interference in political campaigns.

* **[Virginians are hurting because of changes made to the U.S. Postal Service](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac0/53d9897e/55f455d9/1c880b81/2520516/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wfxrtv.com/news/commonwealth-news/sen-mark-warner-stop-messing-with-the-postal-service/")** under Postmaster General Louis DeJoy. Mark is demanding that DeJoy reverse changes to operations at USPS that have caused delays to critical medications and other important mail. Mark will continue to pressure DeJoy to reverse these changes and keep the agency running smoothly, especially in the lead-up to the general election.

* During a roundtable discussion at Smithfield Foods, **[Mark talked with business owners](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac0/53d9897e/55f455d9/1c880b80/2520516/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.dailypress.com/government/nation/dp-nw-warner-smithfield-20200903-k7zrfjmbyreqrf7zadb55hbdpu-story.html")** about their financial struggles during the pandemic. Mark is committed to getting these businesses the relief they need to survive the pandemic and emerge stronger.

* Mark joined Rep. Abigail Spanberger and leaders of Chesterfield County Public Schools to **[discuss the challenges they face as they prepare for reopening schools and virtual learning.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac0/53d9897e/55f455d9/1c880b8f/2520516/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/spanberger-warner-meet-with-chesterfield-county-public-schools-to-discuss-reopening-challenges/")** Mark will work to support schools and students across the Commonwealth during the coronavirus pandemic.

* Labor Day usually means the beginning of politics in Virginia -- but Mark was glad not to miss out on the annual Buena Vista Labor Day tradition as it went virtual this year. **[Mark sent his warm wishes in a video](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac0/53d9897e/55f455d9/1c880b8e/2520516/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://wset.com/news/local/candidates-turn-to-facebook-for-virtual-speeches-in-light-of-canceled-labor-day-parade")** to celebrate the tradition.

* Earlier this week, Mark and Senator Tim Kaine hosted a Facebook Live town hall to answer questions about coronavirus relief and other issues facing Virginians during the pandemic. If you missed the live broadcast, **[click here to view](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac0/53d9897e/55f455d9/1c880b8d/2520516/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.facebook.com/MarkWarnerVa/live_videos/")** , and be on the lookout for more town halls as we get closer to Election Day on November 3rd.

Thank you for your continued support.

-- Team Warner
|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac0/53d9897e/55f455d9/1c880b8c/2520516/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac0/53d9897e/55f455d9/1c880b8b/2520516/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")
